seed_data_creation: None - used existing incident data (80 geolocated incidents in 180-day window)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Adaptive Risk Learning feature fully tested. 3 API endpoints (stats, hotspots, recalculate) all working. Backend uses spatial clustering (500m radius) to group incidents into hotspots with severity weighting (critical=3x, high=2x) and temporal decay (30-day half-life). 18 learned hotspots created from 80 incidents. Frontend dashboard shows all stats, learning parameters, scrollable hotspot zones list with risk scores and badges, and functional refresh/recalculate buttons. Toast notifications working.
